_marker: CONTRADICTION REVIEW QUEUE — computed truth vs static bindings. Resolution is HUMAN-ACK ONLY: extract/computed/resolve.ts applies computed-wins per explicitly named item; nothing auto-resolves.

items.cause: content-conditioned element: .Polaris-Avatar__Text { font-size: var(--p-font-size-400) } styles the Text element Polaris renders only when initials/name are given; the default mount renders the empty .Polaris-Avatar__Initials wrapper, which inherits the provider's body typography (html,body { font-size: var(--p-font-size-325) } = 13px). Computed truth wins: resolve to the unique DTCG candidate {p.font-size-325}; the initials-present branch stays named residue (no contract channel can be a function of a text prop's value — the standing Avatar refusal class).
UNTRIAGED — a defect until triaged
UNTRIAGED — a defect until triaged
